name: Italian Strawberry Dessert Crepes
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in the top of a double boiler over hot, not boiling water.
2. In a bowl, prepare the batter by mixing the flour, eggs, and egg yolks, milk, granulated sugar (1 tbsp), and salt. Blend well.
3. Heat a 6-inch skillet or crepe pan and brush it with melted butter.
4. Pour in about 3 tbsp of the batter and tilt the pan to spread the batter over the entire bottom.
5. Cook on both sides until set.
6. Stack crepes as they are cooked. Cover them with wax paper until they are ready to be filled.
7. To make the filling, cream the ricotta with the granulated sugar and vanilla. Add strawberries and mix gently.
8. Spoon some of the mixture down the center of each crepe and roll up the crepe.
9. Sprinkle the rolled crepes with confectioner's sugar.
10. Serves 6-8.
